description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named test-p4c-mac that runs on every push to main, on pull requests to main, and on merge groups for main. The workflow has two jobs: test-mac-os-m1 and test-mac-os. The test-mac-os-m1 job runs on macos-14, checks out the repository with submodules, sets up ccache, caches Homebrew packages, installs dependencies, builds the project with specific CMake options, and runs tests with ctest. The test-mac-os job runs on macos-13 with similar steps but with adjustments for x86 architecture and additional Homebrew installations.
